title: Earth Brain Event Processing Pipeline Schema
description: Schema for defining the event processing pipeline in Earth Brain OS v0.5.

pipeline_id.description: Unique identifier for this processing pipeline record.

version.description: Version of the event processing pipeline schema or model.

pipeline_model.description: Canonical name of the processing pipeline model.

earth_brain_event_id.description: Reference to the Earth Brain event processed by this pipeline.

lifecycle_id.description: Reference to the lifecycle record associated with this pipeline.

flow_id.description: Reference to the bidirectional flow record associated with this pipeline.

pipeline_purpose.description: Human-readable purpose of this event processing pipeline.
examples: Define how an Earth Brain event is received, validated, routed, traced, reviewed, circulated, and archived.

pipeline_stages.description: Ordered stages of the Earth Brain event processing pipeline.

stage_id.description: Unique identifier for this pipeline stage.

stage_name.description: Human-readable name of this pipeline stage.

stage_order.description: Order of this stage in the processing pipeline.

stage_type.description: Functional type of this pipeline stage.

responsible_layer.description: Earth Brain OS layer primarily responsible for this stage.

input_signal.description: Input signal accepted by this stage.

output_signal.description: Output signal produced by this stage.

required_state.description: Lifecycle state expected during this stage.

completion_condition.description: Condition required to complete this stage.

trace_required.description: Whether this stage requires trace recording.

review_required.description: Whether this stage requires human, governance, defense, or circulation review.

failure_action.description: Action to take if this stage fails.

notes.description: Optional notes about this pipeline stage.

transition_id.description: Unique identifier for this stage transition.

condition.description: Condition under which this transition is allowed.

on_failure.description: Fallback path if this transition fails.

lifecycle_state_change.description: Optional lifecycle state change associated with this pipeline transition.

operational_controls.description: Operational controls for managing pipeline execution.

max_retry_count.description: Maximum number of retries allowed for a failed stage.

allow_manual_override.description: Whether a human operator may manually override a pipeline decision.

allow_pipeline_suspension.description: Whether the pipeline may be suspended when risk or uncertainty is detected.

require_trace_before_completion.description: Whether trace records are required before the event can be completed.

automatic_archive_allowed.description: Whether completed events may be automatically archived.

review_boundaries.description: Review boundaries applied to the pipeline.

pipeline_summary.description: Optional human-readable summary of this processing pipeline.

feedback_enabled.description: Whether this pipeline can use feedback loops from v0.4.

status.description: Operational status of this processing pipeline record.

notes.description: Optional notes about this processing pipeline record.
